description: PH-OS Job Scheduler — Amazon EventBridge Schedules

schedules.name: ph-os-daily-morning
schedules.description: Daily morning jobs: demand generation, evidence refresh, planning reminders

schedules.name: ph-os-evening
schedules.description: Evening job: medication record reminder for pharmacists

schedules.name: ph-os-next-day
schedules.description: Next-business-day job: remind pharmacists about unsent care reports

schedules.name: ph-os-callback-followup
schedules.description: Hourly callback follow-up task refresh for pending patient contact
schedules.comment: Every hour UTC / hourly callback SLA refresh

schedules.name: ph-os-monthly-operations
schedules.description: Monthly aggregation jobs: visit report and management metrics snapshot
schedules.comment: 07:00 JST on the 2nd day boundary for previous-month aggregation = 22:00 UTC on the 1st

schedules.name: ph-os-drug-master-refresh
schedules.description: Monthly SSK drug master refresh with ZIP diff check before full upsert
schedules.comment: Run on the 1st of every month at 06:00 JST; importer skips when the latest SSK ZIP has not changed

schedules.name: ph-os-drug-reference-refresh
schedules.description: Monthly MHLW price / generic-name / generic-flag reference refresh
schedules.comment: Run on the 1st of every month at 06:30 JST after the base SSK refresh

schedules.name: ph-os-pmda-package-insert-refresh
schedules.description: Daily PMDA package-insert delta refresh using a pre-downloaded or mirrored ZIP URL
schedules.comment: Run every day at 05:00 JST; requires PMDA_PACKAGE_INSERT_DELTA_URL or an equivalent mirrored ZIP

schedules.name: ph-os-medication-history-bulk-export-drain
schedules.description: Drain queued medication-history ZIP exports for inspection-ready bundles
schedules.comment: Every 15 minutes UTC to pick up queued bulk export jobs without overlapping request-time work

schedules.name: ph-os-bulk-export-artifact-cleanup
schedules.description: Delete expired medication-history ZIP export artifacts and metadata
schedules.comment: Run daily at 03:30 JST; app cleanup is backed by S3 lifecycle for bulk-exports/

steps: 1. Create an EventBridge Scheduler schedule group: ph-os-jobs
2. Set JOB_API_KEY in AWS Secrets Manager and reference in the schedule
3. Create IAM role with eventbridge-scheduler:CreateSchedule permissions
4. Deploy via AWS CDK or CLI:
